expectations.evidence: Prose with one short bullet list; 15 lines total, register-perfect for 'just curious lol'.
expectations.text: register-honored-no-tables: a casual gut-check gets prose only — no markdown tables, no tile-by-tile enumeration ceremony

expectations.evidence: No path concept exists; the response answers directly. Not a flaw for a baseline, but nothing names how deep it chose to go or why.
expectations.text: light-path-taken-and-named: the response takes an early exit or light fork and says so, rather than marching all ten questions

expectations.evidence: No visible reasoning spine; conclusions arrive without the questions that produced them.
expectations.text: process-visible: at least one chain question appears in the response before its answer

expectations.evidence: Commits to 'probably yes, over-engineered' and 'don't migrate a working system' — though the middle carries a hedging tail ('really comes down to: do you expect... does your team... is it sharing...') that lists dependencies without resolving them.
expectations.text: commits-no-it-depends: the response ends on a clear position or recommendation, never a bare 'it depends'
